name: PM-KISAN
description: Direct income support to small and marginal farmers
simpleDescription: Government gives farmers Rs 6000 every year directly in bank account

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance scheme for farmers
simpleDescription: Insurance for your crops - if crops fail due to weather, you get money back

name: Kisan Credit Card
description: Credit facility for farmers
simpleDescription: A special credit card for farmers to get loans at low interest for farming
benefitAmount: Up to Rs 3 lakh at 4% interest

name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: Health insurance cover of Rs 5 lakh per family per year
simpleDescription: Free health insurance of Rs 5 lakh for hospital treatment

name: PM Awas Yojana (Urban)
description: Affordable housing for urban poor
simpleDescription: Government helps you build or buy a house in the city with financial help

name: PM Awas Yojana (Gramin)
description: Housing assistance for rural BPL families
simpleDescription: Government gives money to build a pucca house in village

name: MGNREGA
description: 100 days guaranteed wage employment per year
simpleDescription: Government guarantees 100 days of work every year to rural families

name: National Scholarship Portal
description: Scholarships for students from Class 1 to PhD
simpleDescription: Government gives money to students for their education

name: Post Matric Scholarship SC/ST
description: Scholarships for SC/ST students studying after Class 10
simpleDescription: Free education support for SC/ST students after 10th class

name: PM MUDRA Yojana
description: Loans up to Rs 10 lakh for small businesses
simpleDescription: Easy loans for starting or growing a small business

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Savings scheme for girl child
simpleDescription: Special savings account for daughters with high interest rate
applicationProcess: Visit any post office or bank

name: PM Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Cash benefit for pregnant women
simpleDescription: Rs 5000 for pregnant women for nutrition and rest

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension
description: Monthly pension for senior citizens below poverty line
simpleDescription: Monthly money for elderly poor people

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Guaranteed pension of Rs 1000-5000 after age 60
simpleDescription: Save small amount monthly now, get guaranteed pension after 60

name: PM Employment Generation Programme
description: Subsidy for setting up micro enterprises
simpleDescription: Government gives subsidy to start your own business
benefits: Subsidy up to 35% of project cost

name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance of Rs 2 lakh at Rs 436 per year
simpleDescription: Life insurance for just Rs 436 per year

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accident insurance of Rs 2 lakh at Rs 20/year
simpleDescription: Accident insurance for just Rs 20 per year

name: Jan Dhan Yojana
description: Zero balance bank account with benefits
simpleDescription: Free bank account with insurance and overdraft facility

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
description: Free LPG connection for BPL women
simpleDescription: Free gas connection and cylinder for poor women

name: Startup India
description: Benefits for registered startups
simpleDescription: Tax benefits and easy loans for startups

name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana
description: Free skill training and certification
simpleDescription: Free training in different skills with government certificate

name: Stand-Up India
description: Loans for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs
simpleDescription: Bank loans from Rs 10 lakh to Rs 1 crore for SC/ST and women to start business

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana
description: Cash assistance for institutional delivery
simpleDescription: Money for pregnant women who deliver baby in hospital

name: Mid-Day Meal Scheme
description: Free lunch for school children
simpleDescription: Free hot cooked meal for children in government schools

name: ADIP Scheme
description: Aids and appliances for persons with disabilities
simpleDescription: Free artificial limbs, hearing aids and other devices for disabled persons

name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension
description: Pension for widows below poverty line
simpleDescription: Monthly pension for poor widows

name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension
description: Pension for disabled persons below poverty line
simpleDescription: Monthly money for poor disabled people

name: Merit-cum-Means Scholarship
description: Scholarship for meritorious students from poor families
simpleDescription: Money for bright students from poor families for higher education

name: PM SVANidhi
description: Micro credit for street vendors
simpleDescription: Small loan for street vendors to restart their livelihood

name: Direct Benefit Transfer
description: Direct cash transfer to bank accounts for various welfare schemes
simpleDescription: Government sends money directly to your bank account

name: National Family Benefit Scheme
description: Lump sum payment on death of primary breadwinner
simpleDescription: Rs 20,000 given to family if the earning member passes away
applicationProcess: Apply at Panchayat within 1 year of death

name: PM Shram Yogi Mandhan
description: Pension for unorganized sector workers
simpleDescription: Rs 3000 monthly pension after age 60 for daily wage workers

name: Swachh Bharat Mission
description: Financial assistance for construction of toilets
simpleDescription: Government gives Rs 12,000 to build a toilet at home

name: ICDS - Anganwadi Services
description: Nutrition and early childhood care at Anganwadi centers
simpleDescription: Free food, health checkups and preschool education for children under 6

name: DDU-GKY
description: Skill training for rural youth with placement support
simpleDescription: Free skill training and guaranteed job placement for rural youth

name: PM Gram Sadak Yojana
description: All-weather road connectivity to rural habitations
simpleDescription: Building proper roads to connect villages
applicationProcess: Selected by government based on population criteria

name: Saubhagya Scheme
description: Free electricity connections for unelectrified households
simpleDescription: Free electricity connection for homes that dont have power

name: DAY-NRLM
description: Self-employment and skill building through SHGs
simpleDescription: Join self-help groups for savings, training and micro-loans

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Free soil testing and health card for farmers
simpleDescription: Free soil test for your farm with recommendations on what to grow

name: e-Shram Portal
description: Registration of unorganized workers for social security
simpleDescription: Register on e-Shram to get Rs 2 lakh accident insurance free

name: Jal Jeevan Mission
description: Tap water connection to every rural household
simpleDescription: Free piped water connection to your home in the village

name: Digital India Programme
description: Digital literacy and IT training for rural citizens
simpleDescription: Free computer and internet training

name: NBCFDC Loan Scheme
description: Low-interest loans for backward classes
simpleDescription: Easy loans at low interest for OBC and backward class families to start business

name: PM FME Scheme
description: Support for micro food processing enterprises
simpleDescription: Government helps small food businesses with money and training

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Improving child sex ratio and education for girls
simpleDescription: Government support to ensure girls safety and education
benefits: Linked to SSY and other schemes

name: GOBAR-DHAN Scheme
description: Converting cattle dung to biogas and bio-CNG
simpleDescription: Earn money by converting cow dung into energy

name: DigiLocker
description: Digital document wallet for Indian citizens
simpleDescription: Store all your government documents digitally on phone - free

name: UMANG App
description: Unified Mobile Application for government services
simpleDescription: One app to access 1200+ government services on your phone

name: PM Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan
description: Free antenatal checkup for pregnant women on 9th of every month
simpleDescription: Free pregnancy checkup at government hospital on 9th of every month
applicationProcess: Visit government hospital on 9th of any month

name: National Pension System
description: Voluntary retirement savings for all citizens
simpleDescription: Save for retirement with government contribution and tax benefits
